basic_details.job_title: IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website for the recruitment of 2 Junior Research Fellow posts. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 for the Junior Research Fellow position.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidates will be given age relaxation as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech in Water Resources Engineering/Hydraulic Engineering/Hydrology/Environment Engineering/Geoinformatics/Remote Sensing & GIS/Civil Engineering/Earth Sciences or equivalent, MSc in Environmental Science and Atmospheric Science, GATE/NET qualified
qualification.details: M.Tech in Water Resources Engineering, Hydraulic Engineering, Hydrology, Environment Engineering, Geoinformatics, Remote Sensing & GIS, Civil Engineering, or Earth Sciences or equivalent. MSc in Environmental Science and Atmospheric Science. GATE/NET qualified. Candidates awaiting M.Tech results are eligible.

salary_details.details: ₹37000/- p.m. + HRA (for the first two years) ₹42000/- p.m. + HRA (for the third year)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project requirements Interview (online or in-person)
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have completed M.Tech in specific engineering disciplines or MSc in Environmental Science and Atmospheric Science, along with a valid GATE/NET qualification. Those awaiting M.Tech results are also eligible.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT (ISM) Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for these positions is 28 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated stipend of ₹37000/- per month plus HRA for the first two years, and ₹42000/- per month plus HRA for the third year.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the IIT (ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow positions?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification released by IIT (ISM) Dhanbad for these positions.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their merit and project requirements, followed by an interview, which can be conducted online or in-person.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology (ISM) Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad).

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is SRDP13001.
